name: Standard Auto Sales
description_short: Independent used car dealership in Bakersfield, CA offering pre-owned vehicles with full financing options for buyers with varied credit histories.
description_long:
Standard Auto Sales in Bakersfield, California (1220 Brundage Ln, 93304) is a small independent used vehicle dealership that has operated in the Bakersfield market for approximately nine years. It is one of several unrelated local businesses across the country sharing this name — each is independently owned with no franchise or corporate affiliation. The Bakersfield location is not a financial services firm, credit union, or lender; it is a used car lot that also arranges vehicle financing for its customers.

The dealership sells pre-owned cars and trucks to local buyers and offers full financing options to help customers complete a purchase. While the specific terms, down payment requirements, and lenders used are not published online, the financing program appears designed to serve buyers across a range of credit profiles — a common model among independent used car dealerships in mid-sized California markets. No subscription fees, setup fees, or service plans apply; customers pay for the vehicle itself.

With a 5.0 out of 5.0 Google rating across 298 reviews, the Bakersfield location has an unusually strong customer satisfaction record for a used car dealership of its size. That volume of reviews and a perfect average score suggest consistent repeat and referral business. The dealership's longevity (~9 years in Bakersfield) indicates stable community presence. These are meaningful differentiators in an industry segment where consumer trust is historically low.

The primary limitation of Standard Auto Sales Bakersfield is the lack of publicly available detail: pricing, interest rates, financing partners, and inventory are not prominently disclosed online. It is not BBB accredited, and specific BBB letter grades were unverifiable. As a small local lot, inventory is limited compared to franchise dealers, and buyers should expect to negotiate terms in person. This is not a financial services product — consumers looking for a personal loan, credit repair, or credit building tools should look elsewhere; this listing is relevant only to buyers seeking a used vehicle with in-house or arranged financing.
pros: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating from 298 customer reviews — exceptionally high for an independent used car lot
Approximately 9 years in business in Bakersfield, indicating stable local presence
Full financing options available, serving buyers who may not qualify for traditional bank auto loans
Independent local dealership with no corporate overhead or franchise pressure tactics
Sells both used cars and trucks, providing variety for different buyer needs
cons: Not BBB accredited; specific BBB letter grade unverified
Financing terms, interest rates, and down payment requirements are not disclosed online
Small independent lot — inventory is limited compared to franchise or certified pre-owned dealers
No confirmed mobile app or self-service online portal for applications or account management
This is a car dealership, not a financial services provider — mismatched listing for users seeking loans or credit products
best_for: Bakersfield-area buyers seeking a used car or truck with financing arranged at the dealership
Buyers with limited, damaged, or no credit history who need in-house or flexible financing options
Local consumers who prefer purchasing from a long-standing independent dealer over a large chain
diagnosis: Standard Auto Sales Bakersfield is best suited for local used vehicle buyers who need flexible financing and value a small dealership's customer-focused reputation, evidenced by its rare perfect Google score across nearly 300 reviews. The main caveat is that this is a car dealership, not a consumer finance or credit product — visitors to CreditDoc looking for loans, credit repair, or credit-building tools will not find those services here.
services: Financing options for varied credit profiles
